parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>20. <BIBL><TITLE>Falckeisische Bibel</TITLE> noch gantz neu in <FORMAT>Schweins-leder</FORMAT> gebunden, <NOTE>√†</NOTE> <PRIZE>12. Gulden</PRIZE></BIBL>, oder gegen einem neuen <BIBL><TITLE>Corpore Juris</TITLE>, <EDITION><PLACE>Leipziger</PLACE> Edition</EDITION>, zu vertauschen.</BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation: 1) The stray symbols "√†" were untagged and likely represent a marginal/print mark, so they were wrapped in <NOTE>...</NOTE> to keep the XML well-structured. 2) "Leipziger Edition" was previously tagged only as <PLACE>; this was refined to <EDITION><PLACE>Leipziger</PLACE> Edition</EDITION> so semantic structure is clearer. 3) The second <BIBL> element was not closed before </ITEM>; a closing </BIBL> tag was added to make the XML well-formed.
